channel.title: ENPH — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on ENPH (Enphase Energy) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: NEW POSITION ENPH · Q4 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) new position ENPH in Q4 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. New solar position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Jeffrey Ubben)
